item.title: Ukulele Time Yuji: Colours - Donovan - Key of A
item.description: Play along video for the song Colours from the channel Ukulele Time Yuji. Artist: Donovan. Chords: A, D, E7.

item.title: ukulele plus: Joey - Concrete Blonde - Key of G
item.description: Play along video for the song Joey from the channel ukulele plus. Artist: Concrete Blonde. Chords: C, D, Em, G.

item.title: Miss Oli: Best In Me - Blue - Key of C
item.description: Play along video for the song Best In Me from the channel Miss Oli. Artist: Blue. Chords: Am, Bm, C, D, Dm, E7, F, G.

item.title: Miss Oli: God Must Have Spent - NSYNC - Key of D
item.description: Play along video for the song God Must Have Spent from the channel Miss Oli. Artist: NSYNC. Chords: B, Bm, C, D, Em, F, G.

item.title: Miss Oli: Set Fire To The Rain - Adele - Key of Am
item.description: Play along video for the song Set Fire To The Rain from the channel Miss Oli. Artist: Adele. Chords: Am, C, Dm, F, G.

item.title: Miss Oli: Jeepney - Sponge Cola - Key of D
item.description: Play along video for the song Jeepney from the channel Miss Oli. Artist: Sponge Cola. Chords: A, D, Em, G.

item.title: Ukulele Time Yuji: Rayando El Sol - Maná - Key of F
item.description: Play along video for the song Rayando El Sol from the channel Ukulele Time Yuji. Artist: Maná. Chords: Am, B♭, B♭maj7, C, Dm7, F.

item.title: ucanlele (ukulele tutorial): Annie's Song - John Denver - Key of D
item.description: Play along video for the song Annie's Song from the channel ucanlele (ukulele tutorial). Artist: John Denver. Chords: A, A7, Asus4, Bm, D, Dsus4, Em, F♯m, G.

item.title: ukeplayalongs: Can You Feel The Love Tonight - Elton John - Key of B♭
item.description: Play along video for the song Can You Feel The Love Tonight from the channel ukeplayalongs. Artist: Elton John. Chords: A♭, B♭, C7, Cm, E♭, F, Gm.

item.title: ukeplayalongs: Can You Feel The Love Tonight - Elton John - Key of C
item.description: Play along video for the song Can You Feel The Love Tonight from the channel ukeplayalongs. Artist: Elton John. Chords: Am, B♭, C, D7, Dm, F, G.

item.title: Cynthia Lin: Somewhere Over The Rainbow - Israel Kamakawiwo'ole - Key of C
item.description: Play along video for the song Somewhere Over The Rainbow from the channel Cynthia Lin. Artist: Israel Kamakawiwo'ole. Chords: Am, C, Em, F, G.

item.title: Ukulele Time Yuji: Hawaii - Herb Ohta
item.description: Play along video for the song Hawaii from the channel Ukulele Time Yuji. Artist: Herb Ohta. Chords: Am, C, C7, Dm7, F, G7, Gm7.

item.title: Ukulele Time Yuji: Chan Chan - Buena Vista Social Club - Key of Dm
item.description: Play along video for the song Chan Chan from the channel Ukulele Time Yuji. Artist: Buena Vista Social Club. Chords: A, Dm, F, Gm.

item.title: Miss Oli: The Reason - Hoobastank - Key of C
item.description: Play along video for the song The Reason from the channel Miss Oli. Artist: Hoobastank. Chords: Am, B♭, C, F, G.

item.title: Miss Oli: Too Many Walls - Cathy Dennis & MYMP - Key of A
item.description: Play along video for the song Too Many Walls from the channel Miss Oli. Artists: Cathy Dennis & MYMP. Chords: A, C, D, E, F, F♯m, G.

item.title: Miss Oli: Basang Basa Sa Ulan - Aegis - Key of A
item.description: Play along video for the song Basang Basa Sa Ulan from the channel Miss Oli. Artist: Aegis. Chords: A, D, E, F♯m.

item.title: Miss Oli: How Can I Tell Her - Lobo - Key of D
item.description: Play along video for the song How Can I Tell Her from the channel Miss Oli. Artist: Lobo. Chords: A, Bm, D, E, G.

item.title: ukeplayalongs: Batman Theme - Neal Hefti - Key of G
item.description: Play along video for the song Batman Theme from the channel ukeplayalongs. Artist: Neal Hefti. Chords: C7, D7, G7, Gm7.

item.title: Ukulele Time Yuji: Ode To My Family - The Cranberries - Key of C
item.description: Play along video for the song Ode To My Family from the channel Ukulele Time Yuji. Artist: The Cranberries. Chords: Am, C, E, F, G7sus4.

item.title: Ukulaliens - Ukulele Club: All The Small Things - Blink 182 - Key of C
item.description: Play along video for the song All The Small Things from the channel Ukulaliens - Ukulele Club. Artist: Blink 182. Chords: C, F, G.
